title: Tomato Egg Protein Bowl
instructions: Cook tomatoes into a quick sauce, add spinach, top with eggs, and serve with cottage cheese.

title: Low-Calorie Tofu & Broccoli Stir-Fry
instructions: 1. Press the tofu to remove excess water, then cut into bite-sized cubes. 2. Chop the broccoli, carrot, and red bell pepper. 3. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat (use a splash of water or light cooking spray to keep it weight-loss friendly). 4. Add the carrot and broccoli, cooking for about 5 minutes until slightly tender. 5. Add the red bell pepper and tofu cubes, sautéing for another 5 minutes until the tofu is lightly browned. 6. Stir in the spinach until wilted. 7. Season with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice, salt, and pepper before serving.
